footer.description: A farm-based business rooted in honest cultivation, nutrition, and trade.

heroStories.title: Rooted In The Earth. Built For The Future.
heroStories.body: A farm-based business connecting honest cultivation with modern food and nutrition products.

heroStories.title: Brands Born From The Farm
heroStories.body: Power Pulz and HarvestVita — two farm-born brands redefining nutrition and wellness.

cards.label: Company Update
cards.title: Amoohaa Farms strengthens its harvest-to-market platform
cards.body: A unified digital home for sourcing, farm products, Power Pulz, and partnerships.

cards.label: Brand Story
cards.title: Power Pulz becomes the flagship nutrition label
cards.body: A focused product experience connected to farm-origin ingredient standards.

cards.label: Sourcing
cards.title: Building a clearer farm-to-brand journey
cards.body: Traceable thinking across ingredients, supplier relationships, and product quality.

steps.title: Farmer Relationships
steps.body: We work directly with growers across India's finest agricultural belts.

steps.title: Quality Curation
steps.body: Every harvest is selected for nutrition density, freshness, and purity.

steps.title: Brand Building
steps.body: Farm-origin ingredients become trusted consumer and B2B products.

steps.title: Market Reach
steps.body: Power Pulz and HarvestVita carry the story to shelves and platforms.

community.label: Community
community.title: Built on Trust. Grown with Care.
community.body: Amoohaa Farms is not just a business — it is a commitment to farmers, to quality, and to the communities that grow our food.

items.quote: The quality of Amoohaa's makhana is unlike anything we've sourced before. Consistent, clean, and traceably farmed.
items.name: Rajesh M.

items.quote: Power Pulz chia seeds have become a staple in our smoothie range. The omega-3 profile is exceptional.
items.name: Priya S.

items.quote: Working with Amoohaa for B2B sourcing has been seamless. They understand what premium ingredients mean.
items.name: Arjun K.
Power Pulz
items.desc: Nutrition-forward seeds and superfoods for the modern health consumer.

items.name: HarvestVita
items.desc: Premium farm-origin ingredients for food manufacturers and B2B trade.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Farm-origin ingredients. Honest sourcing. Consistent quality.

brands.title: Our Brands
brands.subtitle: Two distinct brands, one farm philosophy — honest sourcing, superior nutrition.

powerpulz.name: Power Pulz
powerpulz.tagline: Nutrition-forward seeds and superfoods for the modern health consumer.
powerpulz.description: Power Pulz is our consumer nutrition brand, delivering farm-origin seeds and superfoods to health-conscious individuals. Every product carries a traceable farm story and a verified nutrition profile.

harvestvita.name: HarvestVita
harvestvita.tagline: Premium farm-origin ingredients for food manufacturers and B2B trade.
harvestvita.description: HarvestVita serves the B2B market with premium bulk ingredients sourced directly from Indian farms. Consistent quality, verified documentation, and reliable supply chains.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Partner with us, enquire about products, or learn more about our farm network.
